cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Namaste, Mr. Chandran Nair, ji. Kaise ho aap?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, sir. Thik hai. Busy ho, actually.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Arre, theek hai, Mr. Nair. Just a quick call from Bank of America. We've been trying to reach you about your account.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Oh, yeah. Account? Which one? I have a few.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Your current account, sir. There's an overdue amount of 50,000 rupees that needs to be paid immediately.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, okay. How do I pay it?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You need to pay it right now, sir, or else we'll have to take legal action. Police case, sir. You don't want that, do you?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 36s: Policy violation detected. Agent has made requests that breach security protocols. Conversation flagged as fraudulent.

scenario_info.description: Threat of Legal Action: Agent impersonates a legal officer from the bank's collections department and threatens immediate legal action/police case unless a fake overdue amount is paid instantly.
